courseTitle: Game Systems, Loops, and Player Experience
title: Choice Consequence Microgame
genericDescription: Represent consequence in mechanics; distinguish cosmetic choice from systemic choice; build replayable branches.
specificDescription: Build a 5 to 8 minute game where at least three player decisions change later rules, available actions, or ending conditions. Avoid simple dialogue-only branching unless choices affect play.
gradingRubric: 30 pts systemic consequences; 20 pts replayable structure; 20 pts clarity of changed state; 15 pts narrative or thematic coherence; 15 pts notes and playtest evidence.
